privileged_info_summary: I discovered that this task is defective. Critical required files (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the target documents (DRP_Original.docx, DRP_Revised.docx) do not exist anywhere in the environment. Because the setup fails and no documents are provided, the task is programmatically unscorable and impossible to complete.
